nasb.text: He has also established them forever and ever; He has made a decree which will not pass away.

esv.text: And he established them forever and ever; he gave a decree, and it shall not pass away.

cnv.text: 他把它們立定，直到永永遠遠； 他立了定律，永不廢去。

ccb.text: 祂使这一切各处其位， 永不改变， 祂的命令永不废弃。

csbs.text: 他确立这些，直到永永远远； 他赐下法令，永不废去。
